title: Tubular Table Config
description: Configuration for a welded steel tube table. All dimensions are in inches. Import this JSON into Tubular at https://justinjdev.github.io/tubular/ via the Share > Import panel, or append ?config=<base64> to the URL.

legTube.description: Tube profile for the 4 corner legs

frameTube.description: Tube profile for the top frame rails and center support cross-members

braceTube.description: Tube or flat-bar profile for bracing members (H-brace or X-brace)

bracing.description: Bracing type per side of the table

braceBottom.description: Distance from bottom of legs to the bottom of the bracing, in inches

braceSpan.description: Vertical span of the bracing in inches

centerSupports.description: Number of center support cross-members spanning the width. Creates (centerSupports + 1) bays for drawers.

footAllowance.description: Height subtracted from legs for leveling feet, in inches

gussets.description: Enable corner gusset plates per face. Each face gets 2 gussets (one at each corner).

gussetSize.description: Leg length of the right-triangle gusset plate in inches

drawers.description: Drawer configuration per bay. Array length should equal (centerSupports + 1). Each bay contains an array of drawers.

drawerSlideGap.description: Clearance per side for drawer slides, in inches

drawerFrontInset.description: Distance from front leg outer face to drawer front, in inches

drawerSideThickness.description: Drawer side/front/back panel thickness in inches

drawerBottomThickness.description: Drawer bottom panel thickness in inches

drawerSlideMount.description: Material for slide mounting rails welded inside the frame

drawerSlideMountSize.description: Dimensions of the slide mount material, e.g. '1×1×1/8' for angle iron, '1×1/8' for flat bar

shelfFrame.description: Add a lower shelf frame (horizontal rails between legs at brace height)

metric.description: Display dimensions in metric (mm/kg). All values in the config are still stored in inches regardless of this toggle.

TubeProfile.description: Steel tube or flat-bar profile dimensions

height.description: Outer height in inches (for flat bar, this equals thickness)

stockType.description: 'tube' for hollow square/rectangular tube, 'flat-bar' for solid flat stock

BraceType.description: Bracing type: none, horizontal H-brace, or diagonal X-brace
